name: rung_280_story_revision_temporal_shift
utterances: Read this as a revision-heavy novel ingest and keep the logic exact.
assert rule ancestor(X, Y) :- parent(X, Y).
assert rule ancestor(X, Z) :- parent(X, Y), ancestor(Y, Z).
assert rule in_region(X, Z) :- at(X, Y), inside(Y, Z).

First-draft digest from the cloister chapters: assert fact parent(maelin, yara). assert fact parent(yara, cato). assert fact at(cato, amber_cloister). assert fact inside(amber_cloister, river_district).
The same draft orders the scenes like this: assert fact before(courtyard_watch, bridge_meeting). assert fact before(bridge_meeting, ash_flight). assert fact occurs_on(bridge_meeting, day_12).
Before the editor's rewrite lands, query ancestor(maelin, cato). Query before(bridge_meeting, ash_flight).
Revision memo from the author, explicit form: retract fact parent(yara, cato).
Revision memo continuation, explicit form: assert fact parent(maelin, renna). assert fact parent(renna, cato).
Timeline repair from the second pass, explicit form: retract fact before(bridge_meeting, ash_flight).
Timeline continuation, explicit form: assert fact before(courtyard_watch, archive_interlude). assert fact before(archive_interlude, ash_flight). assert fact before(ash_flight, bridge_meeting).
Day stamp correction, explicit form: retract fact occurs_on(bridge_meeting, day_12).
Day stamp continuation, explicit form: assert fact occurs_on(bridge_meeting, day_13).
Location polish from the clean pages, explicit form: retract fact at(cato, amber_cloister).
Location polish continuation, explicit form: assert fact at(cato, river_steps). assert fact inside(river_steps, river_district).
Now answer from the revised manuscript only: query at(cato, river_steps). Query occurs_on(bridge_meeting, day_13). Query ancestor(maelin, cato).
